rows.label: qev013805_MSG0001
rows.name:
You're late. But fortunately,
we're still in the middle of
it. You can watch closely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0002
rows.name: Now, the first Ma-non. You may choose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0004
rows.name:
Will you jump off from there,
or be bathed in my bullets?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0005
rows.name: I-I don't want either...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0006
rows.name: I see. In that case...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_JNK0110
rows.name: Stop Alex

rows.label: qev013805_SEL0111
rows.name: Shout at Alex to stop.

rows.label: qev013805_JNK0120
rows.name: Observe

rows.label: qev013805_SEL0121
rows.name: Watch and see how this plays out.

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0014
rows.name:
Next is the Ma-non next to it. Arere
or whatever it was. It's a hassle to
remember such a bizarre name, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0015
rows.name: It's Arwe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0016
rows.name:
Ma-non can provide technology
to Earthlings. There should be
no benefit to killing us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0017
rows.name: Hardship now, pleasure later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0018
rows.name: ...Then what must we do to be saved?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0019
rows.name:
Jumping from there probably has a
slightly higher survival rate. That
is your one and only choice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0020
rows.name: ...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_JNK0220
rows.name: Turn Away

rows.label: qev013805_SEL0221
rows.name: Avert your eyes from the horrible scene.

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0029
rows.name: Time's up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0030
rows.name: Now, the last one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0031
rows.name:
I like Earthlings. I want to know
more. But I hate Earthlings like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0032
rows.name:
Therefore, I cannot
afford to die just yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0035
rows.name: You disgust me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_SEL0321
rows.name: Stand by helplessly as the Ma-non dies.

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0042
rows.name:
How foolish. With this, our
goal has been accomplished.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0043
rows.name:
I hope the Ma-non deepen their
understanding at least a little...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0044
rows.name:
...What is with that look? I said we
would make NLA more noble. Are you
saying you didn't understand that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0046
rows.name: Coming to this planet, I learned...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0047
rows.name:
That aside from the aliens who
destroyed Earth, there are numerous
other terrifying beings in existence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0048
rows.name:
Don't you think the terrifying
technology of the Ma-non is even
more frightening than the Growth!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0049
rows.name:
If they were to seriously use that
technology to attack our NLA, the city
would surely be occupied within days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0050
rows.name:
That's right... At this rate, everything
will eventually be replaced by aliens. Then
the end result for Earthlings is slavery.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0051
rows.name:
But if you take the initiative, you control
others. If we eliminate the aliens immediately,
Earthlings will never be oppressed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_JNK0410
rows.name: Argue

rows.label: qev013805_SEL0411
rows.name: Tell Alex that he's wrong.

rows.label: qev013805_JNK0420
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev013805_SEL0421
rows.name:
Reluctantly concede that
Alex's plan has some merit.

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0057
rows.name: I see... I am glad you agree.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0058
rows.name:
I will contact you again. I ask
for the same support and understanding
then as you showed today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0064
rows.name: Ah, that hurt...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0065
rows.name:
Oh, I am fine. It is just a scratch.
It is a good thing I practice
playing dead on a daily basis.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0066
rows.name:
There are bad people among Earthlings
too. We should have known that,
but our awareness was naive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0070
rows.name:
However, I believe we will surely become
able to join hands with Earthlings. Oh
right, as thanks for saving me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0068
rows.name:
...I wanted to give you something,
but it seems I dropped everything
you might have liked earlier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0069
rows.name:
Ouch... I am sorry. I will
head back first. F-Farewell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0073
rows.name:
You understand nothing... Looking at
this situation, do you realize nothing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0074
rows.name: Coming to this planet, I learned...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0075
rows.name:
That aside from the aliens who
destroyed Earth, there are numerous
other terrifying beings in existence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0076
rows.name:
Don't you think the terrifying
technology of the Ma-non is even
more frightening than the Growth!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0077
rows.name:
If they were to seriously use that
technology to attack our NLA, the city
would surely be occupied within days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0078
rows.name:
That's right... At this rate, everything
will eventually be replaced by aliens. Then
the end result for Earthlings is slavery.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0079
rows.name:
But if you take the initiative, you control
others. If we eliminate the aliens immediately,
Earthlings will never be oppressed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0086
rows.name:
It seems you too were just part of the
rabble tainted by optimistic thinking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0087
rows.name:
Collusion that mixes the pure
with the impure can never carve
out a future for Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0080
rows.name:
...Hmm, let us end the chatting here. If
I cannot gain your understanding, I will
just have to prove it through force.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0088
rows.name:
I am not the only one who wishes
to eliminate the aliens...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0089
rows.name:
There are others, like this...
We exist as a team...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0081
rows.name:
I won't let anyone interfere
with me... I'll annihilate
you along with the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0082
rows.name: Thank you very much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0083
rows.name: Express Remorse

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0084
rows.name: Apologize profusely for what happened.

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0085
rows.name: Express Concern

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0090
rows.name:
Ask Wikaye if she is hurt
and how you can help her.

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0092
rows.name:
There are bad people among Earthlings
too. We should have known that,
but our awareness was naive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0093
rows.name:
It seems the Ma-non's
efforts are still lacking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0094
rows.name:
However, I believe we will surely become
able to join hands with Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0096
rows.name:
I am fine. When push comes to shove,
I play dead. I am quite good at it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0097
rows.name:
Ma-non are not discouraged by something
like this. So please do not worry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0098
rows.name:
There are bad people among us as
well. The same goes for Earthlings.
Our awareness was naive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0099
rows.name: That is all there is to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0102
rows.name:
Oh right, I must give you something
as thanks for saving me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013805_MSG0106
rows.name:
Please accept this reward!
Thank you very much. Now I
will head back first. Farewell![ST:wait ]
